title: rubus acutibasis
intro: Rubus acutibasis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rubus acutibasis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic agent. Herbal preparations of Rubus acutibasis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
